description: Document the geographic bounding box of the 'Fells Loop' track in Garmin BaseCamp. Create four waypoints named 'BB-NW', 'BB-NE', 'BB-SW', and 'BB-SE' at the track's northwest, northeast, southwest, and southeast extremes. Organize these waypoints in a new list called 'Survey Extent'. Export the waypoints to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\track_bounding_box.gpx' and create a report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bounding_box_report.txt' containing the bounding box coordinates (North, South, East, West) in decimal degrees and the approximate North-South and East-West spans in kilometers.
